meaning: n.螳樣ｪ檎鳩蠖ｱ髯｢,蠖ｱ迚勛お阯丞ｮ､
examples: The Carmel Centre is also home to the Cinematheque, a classy movie theatre that screens Israeli films and independent foreign flicks.
Gary Mak, director of Broadway Cinematheque -- Hong Kong's last-remaining alternative-screening venue -- remains optimistic about more adventurous programming and distribution.
There are two screenings of each film, one at the film archive in Sai Wan Ho and the other at indie theatre Broadway Cinematheque in Yau Ma Tei.
